title: PatchSandbox y ChangeSet model
wave: Ola 5 — Sandbox, patch/refactor ejecutable y rollback

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-41 implementa una capacidad prevista explícitamente por Fase C usando componentes ya aprobados: PatchPreflightEngine, PolicyEngine, SafeSubprocessRunner, Approval Workflow y ReportEngine. No introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, modelos, Git write, rollback ejecutable, refactor execution ni deploy. La allowlist de git apply real se genera solo como artefacto runtime dentro de outputs/sandbox y no modifica la allowlist global.

pass_criteria: PatchSandboxManager runs PatchPreflightEngine before sandbox application.
The patch is applied only inside outputs/sandbox.
ChangeSet is generated with file actions and before/after hashes.
block_criteria: Patch sandbox modifies productive workspace files.
Sandbox test execution runs without tests.run approval.
ChangeSet includes raw file contents or raw patch text.
Cleanup can remove paths outside outputs/sandbox.
The sprint enables real patch apply, rollback execution, Git write, deploy or refactor execution.
risks: Sandbox copy can differ from the productive workspace due to ignored runtime files.
Large sandboxes can consume disk space; cleanup is explicit.
Sandbox apply is not semantic correctness nor SAST/SCA.
Rollback execution remains future FUNC-SPRINT-42 scope.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-42 — RollbackManager y backup local controlado
